name: LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_323_02
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATECLCARDRISKNUMS_323_02
       @CLREF      INT,
       @TRCODE     SMALLINT,
       @NETTOTAL   FLOAT,
       @COEF       SMALLINT,
       @REPORTRATE FLOAT,
       @BILLED     SMALLINT,
       @STATUS     SMALLINT,
       @STATUSDESP SMALLINT  AS
DECLARE @RISKTYPE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @DESPRISKINC FLOAT
DECLARE @USEREP      SMALLINT
DECLARE @CHK         SMALLINT
DECLARE @EPSILON     FLOAT
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001
SELECT  @CHK  = 0
IF  EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_NTLCK_323  WHERE (LOCKSTR = '323-' +
LTRIM(CAST(CAST('02' AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR)) +'-SERV-1' ))
  BEGIN
       SELECT @CHK = 1
  END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=0) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
          SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (((@TRCODE >= 1) AND (@TRCODE <= 5)) OR (@TRCODE = 26) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34)))
         SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
         ELSE IF (((@TRCODE >= 6) AND (@TRCODE <= 10)) OR ((@TRCODE >= 35) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)))
               SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
         UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTAL = DESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(DESPRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
          IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
           UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
           SET REPDESPRISKTOTAL = REPDESPRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET REPDESPRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPDESPRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
 END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=4) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
         SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
         ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
               SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
         UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTAL = ORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(ORDRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
          IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
           UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
           SET REPORDRISKTOTAL = REPORDRISKTOTAL + @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET REPORDRISKTOTAL = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPORDRISKTOTAL) < @EPSILON
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=1) AND (@STATUSDESP=0)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (@TRCODE = 1)
         SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
         ELSE IF (@TRCODE = 2)
               SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
          SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
         UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTALSUGG = ORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINC
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET ORDRISKTOTALSUGG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(ORDRISKTOTALSUGG) < @EPSILON
         IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
           UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
           SET REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG = REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG + @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
           WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPORDRISKTOTALSUGG) < @EPSILON
END
IF (@CHK<>1 ) AND (@CLREF <> 0) AND EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)) AND (@STATUS=0) AND (@STATUSDESP=1)
 BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKTYPE = RISKTYPE, @USEREP = USEREPRISK
         FROM LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
         WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
         IF (((@TRCODE >= 1) AND (@TRCODE <= 5)) OR (@TRCODE = 26) OR ((@TRCODE >= 30) AND (@TRCODE <= 34)))
           SELECT @DESPRISKINC = -1 * @COEF * @NETTOTAL
          ELSE IF (((@TRCODE >= 6) AND (@TRCODE <= 10)) OR ((@TRCODE >= 35) AND (@TRCODE <= 39)))
                SELECT @DESPRISKINC = @COEF * @NETTOTAL
          IF (@BILLED = 1)
           SELECT @DESPRISKINC = 0
         UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTALSUG = DESPRISKTOTALSUG + @DESPRISKINC
      WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET DESPRISKTOTALSUG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(DESPRISKTOTALSUG) < @EPSILON
          IF @REPORTRATE <> 0
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
          SET REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG = REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG + @DESPRISKINC/@REPORTRATE
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF)
          UPDATE LG_323_02_CLRNUMS
     SET REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG = 0
          WHERE (CLCARDREF = @CLREF) AND ABS(REPDESPRISKTOTALSUG) < @EPSILON
END
